title: Cleverly, James - Secretary of State for the Home Department - ACOBA advice
body: "The Rt Hon Sir James Cleverly left his role at the Home Office in July 2024.  Speaker, JLA Speaker Bureau Ltd The Rt Hon Sir James Cleverly sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with JLA Speaker Bureau. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in May 2025; and the appointment was taken up in later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
